contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: Credentialing workflow improvements — DApp & truesight_me conventions, lineage page UX, anti-pattern docs
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/38
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/42
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/149
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/284
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/167
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/170
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/171
  
  Details:
  Credentialing workflow stability and UX improvements:
  
  1. Switched stores_nearby + store_interaction_history to cache-first signature verification (dapp_beta#38) — eliminates slow Edgar proxy hop, enables China-facing DApp via GitHub CDN.
  
  2. Fixed infinite DApp Remarks ping-pong loop between detect_circle_hosting and hit_list_enrich_contact crons (go_to_market#149) — removed AI: Enrich — manual from rescue targets.
  
  3. Rewrote Sophia's program_registrations_review.html to DApp conventions (dapp_beta#42) — added Twitter Card, DAO logo, TDG badge, @media print, §9b signed-request pre blocks, standard .container layout.
  
  4. Added §17 DApp anti-patterns doc (agentic_ai_context#284) — recurring LLM mistakes cataloged with audit command.
  
  5. Fixed security-dashboard conventions (truesight_me_beta#167) — added GA4, full canonical footer, overlay-click handler, ran sync_top_nav.py across all divergent pages.
  
  6. Fixed lineage governance language (truesight_me_beta#170) — 'reviews + approves' corrected to actual flow (governor reviews → DAO proposal → community voting → provision). Added roster sheet format guidance with sample table.
  
  7. Added URL-param checkbox sync + conditional roster field to lineage-register (truesight_me_beta#171) — operators can share pre-filled onboarding links, roster field only shown when credentialing/activity-reporting is selected.
  
  8. Added TRUESIGHT_ME_PAGE_CONVENTIONS.md to agentic_ai_context — structural conventions for future LLMs.
  
  9. Added quick-links to Butterfly Effect Club admin console header (Cohort Roster sheet + public credentials).
  
  All merged, beta+prod synced.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
